SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-25-2013 Reset From Mar-04-13 To Apr-08-13 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:47am
Judge Pro Tem Richard Beckman, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant Xi Lian Ruan present in pro per. Interperter Joseph Gu interprets Mandarin/English and English/Mandarin on behalf of Appellant also acts as a witness. Respondent Bao Rong Lu present with counsel Trent Goulding state bar # 226245, Interpreter Ling Miao interprets Mandarin/English and English/Mandarin on behalf of the Respondent. Russell Lococo present as a witness for Respondent. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Richard Beckman.

EXRA: Business sales agreement
EXA1: Letter from landlord (3 pages)
EXA2: Statement from landlord

Judge will consider resetting matter back on calendar pending further review.

11:59am
Exhibits retained. Case submitted.
